summary: Iteration 40: Tested Maps Module Refactor, Featured Projects Page, Quill Alignment CSS. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend verified via Playwright - homepage loads with portfolio View All link, /featured-projects shows 6 project cards with 1 having a link, /conferences and /recommended_sites pages render correctly with 'No locations found' (expected - no data for those map types). Admin Maps Manager has map_type dropdown with 3 options and link/open_in_new_tab fields.
critical_code_review_comments: index.css: Quill alignment CSS classes (.ql-align-center, .ql-align-right, .ql-align-justify) properly defined for .rich-text-content elements
FeaturedProjectsPage.js: New page at /featured-projects with 3-column grid, project cards with title/category/description, View Project links for items with links
HomePage.js: PortfolioSection has View All link pointing to /featured-projects, portfolio items with links show arrow icon
HomePage.js: MapSection accepts title prop, 3 new map section keys (map_global, map_conferences, map_recommended) in sectionMap
MapTypePage.js: ConferencesPage and RecommendedSitesPage components using react-leaflet MapContainer with location list
MapsManager.js: Refactored with MAP_TYPES constant (global_business, conferences, recommended_sites), link and open_in_new_tab fields in location dialog
layoutDefinitions.js: Added map_global, map_conferences, map_recommended block types with labels
BlockRenderer.js: MapBlock component with lazy-loaded react-leaflet, handles all 3 map block types
App.js: Routes for /featured-projects, /conferences, /recommended_sites with correct component imports
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: (1) Quill alignment CSS classes present in index.css. (2) /featured-projects page shows all portfolio items in 3-column grid with View Project links. (3) Homepage portfolio section has View All link to /featured-projects. (4) Admin Maps Manager has map_type dropdown with 3 options (Global Business Presence, Conferences, Recommended Sites) and link/open_in_new_tab fields. (5) Backend API /api/public/map-locations?map_type= filtering works correctly - 6 global_business locations, 0 conferences, 0 recommended_sites. (6) /conferences and /recommended_sites pages render with react-leaflet map and location list. (7) Visual Builder has 3 map block types in layoutDefinitions.js. (8) Settings sections include map_global (enabled), map_conferences (disabled), map_recommended (disabled).

quill_alignment_css.details: CSS classes .ql-align-center, .ql-align-right, .ql-align-justify defined in index.css with text-align rules

featured_projects_page.details: /featured-projects shows 6 project cards in 3-column grid with title, category, description, View Project link

homepage_portfolio_view_all.details: Portfolio section has View All link with data-testid='portfolio-view-all' pointing to /featured-projects

homepage_portfolio_links.details: Portfolio items with links show arrow icon (1 item has link: Marketing Growth)

admin_maps_map_type_dropdown.details: Location edit dialog has Map Type dropdown with 3 options: Global Business Presence, Conferences, Recommended Sites

admin_maps_link_fields.details: Location edit dialog has Link input and Open in New Tab toggle

conferences_page.details: /conferences page renders with react-leaflet map, shows 'No locations found' (expected)

recommended_sites_page.details: /recommended_sites page renders with react-leaflet map, shows 'No locations found' (expected)

visual_builder_map_blocks.details: layoutDefinitions.js has map_global, map_conferences, map_recommended block types with labels

homepage_sections_map.details: Settings sections include map_global (enabled), map_conferences (disabled), map_recommended (disabled)

homepage_loads.details: Homepage loads without errors, all sections render correctly
